overall.description: A cinematic view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dense futuristic city street from an elevated balcony position. The camera slowly pans right across a bustling urban canyon filled with neon signage, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture while vehicles and pedestrians move below in the midday sun.

events.description: character in red jacket moves out of frame as camera continues panning right

modern building with distinctive teal and gray paneling on the right side
tree with purple-pink blossoms at street level on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated balcony overlooking a dense cyberpunk city street. A character in a red jacket stands in the foreground before moving out of frame. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, bright pink neon billboards, and a teal modern building across the street. Below, pedestrians walk along the sidewalk and futuristic vehicles move along the multi-lane road, while holographic advertisements float above the street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with street-level vendors and shops

events.description: view shifts from left side of street to center, revealing more street-level activity and vendors

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right across the balcony railing, observing the street activity below

notable_agents.action: futuristic car moving slowly through traffic below

entered.detail: storefronts and commercial establishments at ground level with awnings and signage
purple neon signs and lighting fixtures on distant buildings
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings on the left side
blue illuminated signs on the left building facades

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans right, the view transitions to the center of the street scene. The pink neon billboard moves out of frame while street-level shops and vendors become visible below. The teal building and cherry blossom tree move closer in the frame. A futuristic vehicle moves through the traffic below, and an overhead pedestrian walkway becomes visible connecting the buildings on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with mixed retail and pedestrian activity

events.description: lighting shifts slightly as camera moves into shadow of right-side building

agents.ego_description: completing the rightward pan, focusing on the right side architecture and distant street depth

entered.detail: various store signs and advertisements at street level
multiple holographic projection screens floating above the distant street
architectural details and structural elements of the right-side building complex
deep perspective view down the urban canyon showing distant city structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera completing its rightward pan, focusing on the right side of the street corridor. The cherry blossom tree is now prominent in the near field. The view reveals deep urban canyon perspective with holographic displays visible in the distance. The lighting shifts slightly as the camera moves into the shadow of the right-side building, while street-level commercial activity continues below with pedestrians and sparse vehicle movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan from an elevated balcony that reveals the sprawling depth of a neon-lit cyberpunk urban canyon. It begins with a character in a red jacket standing in the foreground before they move out of frame, uncovering a vista of towering glass skyscrapers, pink neon billboards, and a teal modern building overlooking a bustling multi-lane road. As the camera glides right, the pink signage recedes to make way for street-level vendors and an overhead pedestrian walkway, while a cherry blossom tree gradually draws closer in the frame. The scene then shifts toward the right side of the corridor, where the cherry blossom tree becomes prominent and the perspective deepens to reveal distant holographic displays. Finally, the lighting dims as the camera moves into the shadow of a building, settling on a view of the commercial activity and sparse vehicle movement below.
